name: cliks-workspace
description: Cliks ambient coworking prototype: Vercel site, Render backend, and typ CLI.

scripts.build: npm --workspace @cliks/server run build && npm --workspace @cliks/site run build && npm --workspace @cliks/cli run build
scripts.check: npm --workspace @cliks/server run check && npm --workspace @cliks/site run check && npm --workspace @cliks/cli run check
